hero.welcome: Welcome to Ali CNC Pakistan (We turn wood into awesome stuff)
hero.description: We bridge the gap between digital pixels and shaving premium wood at 24,000 RPM. Led by Raja Muhammad Ali Asghar, a man who speaks fluent G-Code and literally breathes sawdust for breakfast. We design advanced mechanical CAD files, premium 3D reliefs, and CNC toolpaths that will make your neighbors extremely jealous.

services.cad_desc: We translate your coffee-stained napkin sketches into watertight 3D models in Onshape. We make sure they look gorgeous and don't violate the laws of physics. Well, most of them.
services.cnc_desc: Our G-Code is so clean, your CNC router will shed a tear of joy. We program optimized toolpaths so the machine carves wood like hot butter with zero tool breakage.
services.dfm_desc: We audit your crazy ideas before you spend thousands on wood that ends up as expensive firewood. We make it easily manufacturable, efficient, and beautifully carved.

why_choose.precision_desc: Every single cut and carving is double-checked down to the micrometer. We are so obsessive, we apologize to the wood fibers before cutting them.
why_choose.efficiency_desc: Our nesting algorithms are so tight, the leftover scrap wood is barely enough to make a toothpick. Saving your wallet, and keeping local trees happy.
why_choose.expertise_desc: Unlike desk-bound engineers who think CNC is a generic brand of K-Pop music, our CEO Raja Muhammad Ali Asghar actually runs the machinery, gets dirty, and understands actual materials.

faq.q1_title: Can I send you a drawing on a grease-stained napkin?
faq.q1_desc: Absolutely! We accept napkins, cardboard scraps, and telepathic signals. But standard vector files like .DXF, .SVG, .STEP, or .CRV make us do a happy little dance.
faq.q2_title: How fast is your turnaround time?
faq.q2_desc: Standard 2D vectors take 24-48 hours. Complex 3D models take 3-5 days. If you need it yesterday, we can attempt to bend the space-time continuum for a small premium fee.
faq.q3_title: Will my 3D design actually work in the real world?
faq.q3_desc: That's exactly what our DFM check is for! We verify that your 3D parts can actually be fabricated without defying gravity or breaking your drill bits.
faq.q4_title: What's your software stack of choice?
faq.q4_desc: We are black-belt masters of Vectric Aspire for artistic wood relief carving and Onshape for hardcore mechanical engineering CAD design.

experience.role1_desc: Led by Raja Muhammad Ali Asghar, who spends more time talking to CNC spindles than actual human beings. Specializes in turning raw G-Code into premium fine art.

footer.title: Let's Make Some Beautiful Noise
footer.description: Got an impossible 3D CAD design or a giant slab of solid walnut that needs beautiful carving? Let us torture it with 24,000 RPM spindle action today.
footer.copyright: Ali CNC Pakistan. Made in Rawalpindi with love, sweat, and premium sawdust. No routers were harmed in the making of this website.

contact.description: Have a project in mind? Whether it's a high-precision 3D mold or a full CNC production run, Ali CNC Pakistan is ready to turn your dreams (or weird ideas) into physical shapes.
contact.whatsapp_desc: Instant messaging for quick, frantic questions
contact.email_desc: Send a detailed manifesto of your project
contact.cadcrowd_desc: Browse our portfolio and hire us officially
contact.kakaotalk_desc: If you're in Korea and want to talk CNC
contact.form_message_placeholder: Tell us about your project or weird wood carving ideas...
